name: CLX - MGA Insurance Commission Calculate v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Triggered when policy_applications.submission_status='issued'. Reads carrier_appointments for split %, calculates carrier/MGA/advisor commissions in cents, inserts commission_ledger row, links back to policy_applications.commission_ledger_id.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $input.item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ commission_ledger_id: row && row.id }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'commission_calculated', advisor_id: $('Calculate Splits').item.json.advisor_id, policy_application_id: $('Calculate Splits').item.json.policy_application_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { total_commission_cents: $('Calculate Splits').item.json.insert_row.total_commission, advisor_cents: $('Calculate Splits').item.json.insert_row.advisor_commission, mga_cents: $('Calculate Splits').item.json.insert_row.mga_commission, carrier_cents: $('Calculate Splits').item.json.insert_row.carrier_commission }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Ledger').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', commission_ledger_id: row && row.id, advisor_commission_cents: row && row.advisor_commission, mga_commission_cents: row && row.mga_commission }); })() }}
